title: Wild Field Poppies Premium 4-Piece Set of Cork Backed Placemats by Creative Tops, 40 x 29 cm (15.75" x 11.5")
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Protect (and perfect) your table with these lovely, colourful, floral placemats from the Creative Tops Wild Field Poppies collection
The cork-backed placemats feature wild poppies on a cream canvas, and a smooth, shiny lacquer finish
A full premium placemat collection, in one great-value pack: ideal for any nature lover’s table
Complete table protection: the placemats are slip resistant, stain resistant and heat resistant to 120°C (248°F)
Add to your collection with a selection of smaller placemats and coasters that are also available in this range. Dimensions: 40 x 29 cm (15¾" x 11½")
description: From the manufacturer Creative Tops Wild Field Poppies Set of 4 Large Placemats Protect your table in floral style with this Creative Tops Large Placemat Set Decorated with a gorgeous Wild Field Poppies design, these cork-backed placemats feature white, red and pink poppies with green foliage on a cream canvas. The design also displays a smudged, textured style blending the colours together and transporting you back to a balmy summer’s day. This placemat set includes all the table mats you need for serving at a big dinner party table or Christmas lunch, or simply for everyday dining. There are smaller placemats and coasters available to complete the collection More information: Dimensions: 40 x 29 cm (15¾" x 11½") Withstand temperatures of up to 120°C (248°F) Natural cork back Wipe clean only Key Features Protect and Perfect: Keep your dining table pristine with this set of countryside-inspired stylish placemats from Creative Tops. Made to stand out with their gorgeous wild poppy design. Stylish Tableware: These cork placemats are slip resistant, stain resistant and heat resistant to 120°C (248°F) for the ultimate table protection. Build Your Collection: Add to your collection with a selection of smaller placemats and coasters that are also available in this Creative Tops range.
